## Summary

Describe the change clearly and state the user-facing outcome.

## Scope

- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Chrome extension
- [ ] Premiere CEP
- [ ] Release tooling
- [ ] CI or release workflow
- [ ] Documentation

## Verification

List the checks you ran.

- [ ] `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
- [ ] `cd desktop && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd extension && npm run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test

## Notes

Link related issues, mention follow-up work, and attach screenshots or clips for UI changes.
